failure.phase: first forward sparse MLA layer before any completed training step
failure.message: TORCHTITAN_DSV4_PYTORCH_SPARSE_MLA_BACKWARD_MODE=shared_kv requires TORCHTITAN_DSV4_SPARSE_MLA_SHARED_KV_KERNEL_MODULE, or TORCHTITAN_DSV4_SPARSE_MLA_KERNEL_MODULE, to name an importable backend module exposing sparse_mla_shared_kv(...).

read: This run is invalid for MORI native weighted-combine performance. It initialized distributed training and MORI SDMA, but failed before the first metric step because the sparse-MLA SharedKV backend module env was not exported under the TORCHTITAN_DSV4_* name expected by the model code.
next_action: Rerun the same MBS8 materialization gate only after pinning the sparse-MLA backend env to TORCHTITAN_DSV4_SPARSE_MLA_KERNEL_MODULE=torchtitan.models.deepseek_v4.sparse_mla_shared_kv_triton_forward_backend or TORCHTITAN_DSV4_SPARSE_MLA_SHARED_KV_KERNEL_MODULE with the same module.
